item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I didn't QUITE get it until the comment spoiler above, but I upvoted anyway. This article hasn't really gotten much notice, huh?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
spoilers
– hide block

Someone clearly can't tell the difference between humans and other great apes, and might be watching too much human television

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't get it. Expando sponge animals, but the murder stuff just felt…Confusing. No vote either way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It's more than simians, they're just the majority of them. And they're not smart, just mimicking human actions.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Sponge Planet of the Apes?

I can dig it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for mentioning this in the chat!

First of all, I want to mention that the cluster of oddities in the Discovery section is distracting. It starts with the oddly misspelled inscription. If you want it to be misspelled, I'd suggest another misspelling. Something more closely related to actual phonetics of the English language/reasonable spelling error (DO KNOT SALE, perhaps?). Secondly, I really dislike the "Rejection Hotline" reference. Sounds more joke-ish than anything else, in my opinion.

I'm also unclear of what the second misspelled inscription means, lol. You lose meaning when you try too hard to misspell things like that.

I find your idea disgusting and entertaining overall, though! I'll upvote it when you make some improvements. I think some elaboration may even be in order. It just feels a bit plain somehow.
